violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration of 50 ppm.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor under the fryer is due for deep cleaning.
General employee practices. — --Food employee observed eating while preparing food and outside of designated area.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided for chlorine sanitizer for the dish machine.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration of 50 ppm .

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. A chemical bottle in the mop sink room was not labeled.
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
